an6.97:1.1: “Monks, there are these six rewards in realizing the fruit of stream-entry.
an6.97:1.3: One is certain of the true Dhamma. One is not subject to falling back. There is no suffering over what has had a limit placed on it. One is endowed with uncommon knowledge. One rightly sees cause, along with causally-originated phenomena.
an6.97:1.4: “These are the six rewards in realizing the fruit of Stream-entry.”
